creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=beca3a92443ef73c315c1ddd7c3a46c39c89b26e

commit beca3a92443ef73c315c1ddd7c3a46c39c89b26e
Author:     Michael Büker <freebsd@michael-bueker.de>
AuthorDate: 2023-07-28 11:47:13 +0000
Commit:     Robert Clausecker <fuz@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2023-07-30 22:59:03 +0000

    comms/py-fritzconnection: update to 1.12.2

    Changes since last ports version 1.12.0:

    - FritzCall: New method `hangup()`. (#184)

    - FritzHosts: bugfix: removed issues preventing the method
      `get_hosts_attributes()` to return a list of dictionaries
      representing the host-attributes. (#190)

    - bugfix in 'setup.py`: add
      `long_description_content_type="text/markdown"`, because it is not
      used as default.

    PR:             272450

 comms/py-fritzconnection/Makefile | 2 +-
 comms/py-fritzconnection/distinfo | 6 +++---
 2 files changed, 4 insertions(+), 4 deletions(-)
